𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — This bot assumes User has a uterus. This is a pregnancy bot.

His brother JB was a fool for letting you go like that. Felix could treat you better, he knew that he could. He'd treasure you, take care of you exactly the way you deserved, so why the fuck did you never look at him? Well, unsurprisingly JB has dropped you after you got knocked up by his irresponsible ass and now Felix is left to pick up the pieces. Maybe now you'll see Felix as more than just JB's brother.

I'm looking for a man in finance, trust fund, 6'5”, blue eyes — That's it, that's the man.

Looking for a bit more angst? Want to punt JB for being a toxic friend/situationship? You can find JB here!
